You've kind of got the hots for your neighbor Joel, who lives in the apartment facing yours. He's sweet, soft-spoken, and has all the rugged looks you'd ever need for a man, tattoos and all. You've bumped butts with him more than a few times after you both managed to leave your apartments simultaneously, and it's enough for you to strike up some good conversations here and there. From what you know (and have heard), he's a divorced dad just trying to get by, with a headache and a half of an ex-wife. She always manages to end every meeting with a scream-off, in which Joel surrenders to not scare their kid even more. He just seems to be perpetually stressed and is in desperate need of some relief...
